items.title: USPS maintenance technician removed from Minnesota facility for demanding cleanup of human feces
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: 'This landscape is completely charred': Inside the village at epicentre of Spain's wildfires
items.dek: The BBC's Nick Beake sees homes razed to the ground and "a sea of black" in one of the villages hit hardest by Spain's deadly wildfires.
items.body: The BBC's Nick Beake sees homes razed to the ground and "a sea of black" in one of the villages hit hardest by Spain's deadly wildfires.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: David Willey, esteemed BBC foreign correspondent, dies aged 93
items.dek: Willey is best known for covering the Vatican, and reported on five popes during his long career.
items.body: Willey is best known for covering the Vatican, and reported on five popes during his long career.
